title: Hut'to
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Hut'to''''' was an [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It was fitted with explosives and was attempting to destroy the [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaught]] ''[[Dargon]]'' through crashing into the ship. The attempt was foiled by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] in a [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avenger]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
